description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a spacious open-plan layout, featuring multiple rooms and a large outdoor area. The structure includes a prominent patio with a pergola, a swimming pool, and a mix of paved and green spaces. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the exterior amenities. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style, and the building is surrounded by low boundary walls. The interior appears to be divided into living, dining, kitchen, and bedroom areas, with clear access to outdoor recreational spaces. The overall design emphasizes comfort, openness, and integration with the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a patio with pergola, and a swimming pool, blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio area, and partial interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, large windows, and the swimming pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio with pergola, full swimming pool, and open outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the green spaces, patio, and additional access points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
